name: OpenClaw Harness Core
description: Harness runtime for context architecture, workflows, guardrails, audit, and project bootstrap.

defaultAgentId.label: Default Agent Id
defaultAgentId.help: Fallback persistent owner agent for harness actions.

projectId.label: Project Id
projectId.help: Project identifier used for workflow and bootstrap state.

projectRoot.label: Project Root Override
projectRoot.help: Optional project root path relative to the OpenClaw home.

enableBootstrap.label: Auto Bootstrap
enableBootstrap.help: Create the harness scaffold if required files are missing.

enableDynamicContext.label: Dynamic Context
enableDynamicContext.help: Inject a context packet before supported agent runs.

enableGuardrails.label: Guardrails
enableGuardrails.help: Check supported tool calls against policy packs.

enableWriteback.label: Writeback
enableWriteback.help: Write session state, decisions, and failures durably.

enableAudit.label: Audit Logging
enableAudit.help: Append audit events and policy decisions.
